song.title: Like a Lion
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] Let love explode and bring the dead to life A love so bold To see a revolution somehow
[P] Now I'm lost in Your freedom This world I'll overcome
[C] My God's not dead He's surely alive He's living on the inside Roaring like a lion
[V2] Let hope arise and make the darkness hide My faith is dead I need a resurrection somehow
[B] Let heaven roar and fire fall Come shake the ground With the sounds of revival
